allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./src/data/packs/numbers-game.json'\); console.log\('Numbers:', d.question_count, 'questions, actual:', d.questions.length\); const tiers=[90,80,70,60,50,40,30,20,10,5,1]; tiers.forEach\(t => { const c=d.questions.filter\(q=>q.difficulty===t\).length; console.log\('  Tier', t+'%:', c\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./src/data/packs/pattern-spotter.json'\); console.log\('Patterns:', d.question_count, 'questions, actual:', d.questions.length\); const tiers=[90,80,70,60,50,40,30,20,10,5,1]; tiers.forEach\(t => { const c=d.questions.filter\(q=>q.difficulty===t\).length; console.log\('  Tier', t+'%:', c\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./src/data/packs/mzansi-mix-vol1.json'\); console.log\('Mzansi:', d.question_count, 'questions, actual:', d.questions.length\); const tiers=[90,80,70,60,50,40,30,20,10,5,1]; tiers.forEach\(t => { const c=d.questions.filter\(q=>q.difficulty===t\).length; console.log\('  Tier', t+'%:', c\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./src/data/packs/mixed-bag.json'\); console.log\('question_count:', d.question_count\); console.log\('actual questions:', d.questions.length\); const newQs = d.questions.filter\(q => q.id >= 'mx166'\); console.log\('new questions:', newQs.length\); const tiers = [90,80,70,60,50,40,30,20,10,5,1]; tiers.forEach\(t => { const count = newQs.filter\(q => q.difficulty === t\).length; console.log\('tier', t, ':', count, 'questions'\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./src/data/packs/mzansi-mix-vol1.json'\); const diffs = [...new Set\(p.questions.map\(q => q.difficulty\)\)].sort\(\(a,b\) => a-b\); console.log\('Pack:', p.name\); console.log\('Difficulties:', diffs\); console.log\('Count per diff:'\); diffs.forEach\(d => console.log\('  ' + d + '% ->', p.questions.filter\(q => q.difficulty === d\).length\)\)")
